# Test fonts

## NotoSans-Regular.ttf / NotoSans-Bold.ttf

- **Source:** https://github.com/go-text/render (testdata directory)
- **License:** SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1
- **Provenance:** Google LLC (Noto Sans project)
- **Copyright:** 2015–2021 Google LLC. All Rights Reserved.

Both files are byte-identical to those in `github.com/go-text/render@v0.2.0/testdata/`
and are vendored here to ensure deterministic, portable font loading that
works under `-mod=vendor` and on any Go version.

The full OFL 1.1 license text is available at
https://scripts.sil.org/OFL or in the upstream archive at
`github.com/go-text/render@v0.2.0/testdata/OFL.txt`.
